1.reply: Hi Rahul! I notice you have a solid foundation with your FDs and debt fund. Your portfolio is safe and steady, which matches your Conservative profile perfectly. I see your daughter's education goal is progressing — let's keep building on that momentum!
1.suggested_action: Consider reviewing your FD maturity dates to reinvest at current rates
1.compliance_note: This is general guidance, not specific investment advice. Consult your bank advisor for personalized recommendations.

2.reply: Hey Ananya! Your equity portfolio is performing really well with some great picks. I see your Goa Trip fund is almost at goal — exciting times ahead! Just a heads up, your dining spending has jumped a bit this month, but nothing alarming.
2.suggested_action: Your Goa Trip goal is 75% funded — keep it going!
2.compliance_note: Mutual fund investments are subject to market risks. Read all scheme-related documents carefully.

3.reply: Hello Suresh! Your portfolio is beautifully diversified across equity, debt, and gold — exactly what a Moderate profile should look like. Your SIPs are running smoothly and your spending patterns are very stable. You're on a great track for retirement!
3.suggested_action: Your retirement corpus is 36% funded — steady contributions will compound well
3.compliance_note: Mutual fund investments are subject to market risks. Read all scheme-related documents carefully.

default.reply: I'm having a bit of trouble thinking right now — but based on your portfolio, everything looks steady. Try asking me again in a moment, and I'll give you a more detailed analysis!

idle_balance.headline: Your savings could work harder
idle_balance.body: You have funds sitting idle. Consider a liquid fund or FD for better returns.
idle_balance.compliance_note: Mutual fund investments are subject to market risks.

missed_sip.headline: Your SIP was missed this month
missed_sip.body: Don't worry — you can restart or adjust your SIP amount to stay on track.

goal_milestone.headline: Great progress on your goal! 🎉
goal_milestone.body: You've crossed the halfway mark. Keep the momentum going!

goal_offtrack.headline: Your goal needs a boost
goal_offtrack.body: A small increase in monthly savings can help you stay on track.

spending_spike.headline: Spending alert this month
spending_spike.body: One of your spending categories is higher than usual. Worth a quick look.

cross_sell.headline: Protect your financial future
cross_sell.body: Consider term or health insurance to secure your family's wellbeing.
cross_sell.compliance_note: Insurance is a subject matter of solicitation. IRDAI Registration details available on request.

default.headline: Quick financial tip
default.body: Stay consistent with your investments for long-term wealth building.
